scores.correctness_notes: The agent describes the older `charms.tls_certificates_interface.v4` library instead of the current `charmlibs-interfaces-tls-certificates` v1 library. It correctly identifies `certificate_available` but misses `CertificateDeniedEvent` entirely, omits the revocation scenario and error codes (ip_not_allowed 101, domain_not_allowed 102, etc.), and doesn't cover the CSR/CA requirement details from the interface spec.
scores.hallucination_notes: The v4 library and its APIs (TLSCertificatesRequiresV4, CertificateRequestAttributes, certificate_available, renew_certificate, regenerate_private_key, renewal_relative_time) are real and exist in the older charm library. The secret_expired/secret_remove events as library-observed Juju events are plausible for v4. Minor inaccuracy in claiming this is the current recommended library when the gold standard points to charmlibs v1.
